key.name: command
key.description: Command to run when the notification button is clicked. Use {file} as a placeholder for the screenshot file path. If {file} is not present, the path is appended as the last argument. Leave empty to hide the button.

key.name: button-label
key.description: Label shown on the action button added to screenshot notifications.

key.name: pipe-mode
key.description: If true, the screenshot file contents are piped to the command's stdin instead of passing the file path as an argument.

key.name: recording-command
key.description: Command to run when the notification button is clicked after a screen recording. Uses the same {file} placeholder as command. Leave empty to hide the button on recording notifications.

key.name: recording-button-label
key.description: Label shown on the action button added to screen recording notifications.
